did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a scoping review that summarizes and discusses existing literature on the applications of AI in nonmelanoma skin cancer (NMSC) diagnosis, treatment, and surgery. It does not present original research where the authors used AI, machine learning, or deep learning methods to obtain new study results; rather, it evaluates the state of the field.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
